name: CRM · Sales Bookings — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('Alice Johnson', 'Enterprise', 'Closed Won', 42000, 42000),
  ('Alice Johnson', 'SMB', 'Closed Won', 18500, 18500),
  ('Alice Johnson', 'Mid-Market', 'Proposal', 22000, 22000),
  ('Bob Martinez', 'Enterprise', 'Closed Won', 67000, 67000),
  ('Bob Martinez', 'Enterprise', 'Negotiation', 55000, 55000),
  ('Bob Martinez', 'SMB', 'Closed Won', 9800, 9800),
  ('Carol Lee', 'Mid-Market', 'Closed Won', 31000, 31000),
  ('Carol Lee', 'SMB', 'Proposal', 14000, 14000),
  ('Carol Lee', 'Enterprise', 'Closed Won', 48000, 48000),
  ('David Kim', 'SMB', 'Closed Won', 11200, 11200),
  ('David Kim', 'Mid-Market', 'Negotiation', 27000, 27000),
  ('Eve Patel', 'Enterprise', 'Closed Won', 91000, 91000),
  ('Eve Patel', 'Mid-Market', 'Closed Won', 34000, 34000),
  ('Eve Patel', 'SMB', 'Proposal', 8500, 8500),
  ('Frank Wu', 'Enterprise', 'Negotiation', 72000, 72000),
  ('Frank Wu', 'Mid-Market', 'Closed Won', 29000, 29000),
  ('Frank Wu', 'SMB', 'Closed Won', 15000, 15000)
) AS t(sales_rep, product_line, deal_stage, bookings_amount, pipeline_value)
